sourcesContent:
import React from 'react';
import { Box, Typography, Grid, Paper } from '@mui/material';
import Projects from '../components/Projects';
import Certificates from '../components/Certificates';
import Publications from '../components/Publications';
import Blog from '../components/Blog';
import Contact from '../components/Contact';

const Home = () => {
  return (
    <Box>
      {/* Hero Section */}
      <Paper
        sx={{
          position: 'relative',
          backgroundColor: 'grey.800',
          color: '#fff',
          mb: 4,
          backgroundSize: 'cover',
          backgroundRepeat: 'no-repeat',
          backgroundPosition: 'center',
          backgroundImage: 'url(https://source.unsplash.com/random?tech)',
          height: '60vh',
          display: 'flex',
          alignItems: 'center',
          justifyContent: 'center'
        }}
      >
        <Box
          sx={{
            position: 'absolute',
            top: 0,
            bottom: 0,
            right: 0,
            left: 0,
            backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,.5)'
          }}
        />
        <Box
          sx={{
            position: 'relative',
            p: { xs: 3, md: 6 },
            pr: { md: 0 }
          }}
        >
          <Typography
            component="h1"
            variant="h3"
            color="inherit"
            gutterBottom
            align="center"
          >
            Welcome to My Portfolio
          </Typography>
          <Typography variant="h5" color="inherit" paragraph align="center">
            Full Stack Developer | Machine Learning Enthusiast | Problem Solver
          </Typography>
        </Box>
      </Paper>

      {/* Main Content */}
      <Grid container spacing={4}>
        <Grid item xs={12}>
          <Typography variant="h4" gutterBottom>
            Featured Projects
          </Typography>
          <Projects featured />
        </Grid>

        <Grid item xs={12}>
          <Typography variant="h4" gutterBottom>
            Certifications
          </Typography>
          <Certificates featured />
        </Grid>

        <Grid item xs={12}>
          <Typography variant="h4" gutterBottom>
            Publications
          </Typography>
          <Publications featured />
        </Grid>

        <Grid item xs={12}>
          <Typography variant="h4" gutterBottom>
            Latest Blog Posts
          </Typography>
          <Blog featured />
        </Grid>

        <Grid item xs={12}>
          <Typography variant="h4" gutterBottom>
            Contact Me
          </Typography>
          <Contact />
        </Grid>
      </Grid>
    </Box>
  );
};

export default Home;
